rootCauses.rootCause: Package manifests and pnpm-lock.yaml are inconsistent.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Push manifest changes without regenerating the lockfile.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Generate the lockfile with pnpm and verify pnpm install --frozen-lockfile.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Treat manifests, lockfile, workspace settings, and build approvals as one atomic dependency change.

rootCauses.rootCause: Selected package versions do not satisfy the complete peer-dependency graph.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Select package versions independently or weaken strict peer enforcement.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Inspect the complete peer graph and choose mutually compatible exact versions.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Peer compatibility review is required before dependency changes are committed.

rootCauses.rootCause: A resolved dependency requires an install or build script that is not explicitly approved.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Add dependencies without inspecting transitive build behavior.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Inspect the resolved dependency graph and explicitly approve only justified build scripts.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Every dependency change includes a build-script audit.

rootCauses.rootCause: Changed files were not processed by the repository's exact formatter before the formatting check.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Use CI as the first formatting inspection.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Run pnpm format, review the diff, then run pnpm format:check before pushing.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Formatting write is a mandatory precondition for source submission.

rootCauses.rootCause: Internal Next.js navigation used a plain HTML anchor instead of the framework navigation component.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Treat internal and external navigation as equivalent.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Use Link from next/link for internal routes.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Review framework-specific lint rules for changed UI files.

rootCauses.rootCause: The ESLint configuration was exported anonymously while zero-warning linting is enforced.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Assign the configuration to a named constant and export that value.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Run lint locally and treat every warning as a failure.

signatures: ProcessEnv has no properties in common
rootCauses.rootCause: A custom environment interface was narrower than the runtime ProcessEnv object.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Model process.env as only a few named optional properties.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Model the boundary from the runtime shape, including the string index signature.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Boundary types must reflect the actual runtime object.

rootCauses.rootCause: A prototype-identity assertion recursively inspected Prisma proxy internals.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Use toBeInstanceOf against proxy-heavy generated clients.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Verify construction and observable behavior without prototype introspection.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Prefer behavioral assertions for generated and proxy-based clients.

rootCauses.rootCause: A generated-file patch depended on exact whitespace instead of stable source structure.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Patch generated output with indentation-sensitive text matching.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Use direct source edits or structural or AST-aware transformations, then remove temporary generators.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Brittle whitespace patches are prohibited for permanent implementation.

rootCauses.rootCause: Static SQL presence was substituted for executable database-integrity evidence.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Assert that trigger or constraint text exists without executing the behavior.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Use transaction-backed PostgreSQL tests for the required integrity behavior.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Database behavior requirements require live database tests.

rootCauses.rootCause: A repository-content action was selected for a pull-request metadata target.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Repeat the same wrong write action while merely describing the correct intended action.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Classify the target before every write and use update_pull_request for PR metadata.
rootCauses.preventionControl: One target-action mismatch triggers an immediate stop condition.

rootCauses.rootCause: Mutable source content was used to store evidence about the commit containing that content.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Write exact verification run identifiers into source after every green run.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Freeze source and store exact run evidence in PR metadata or release records.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Source files must not contain the workflow run that verifies themselves.

rootCauses.rootCause: Polling cadence was driven by visible activity rather than meaningful engineering state changes.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Poll frequently and narrate unchanged stages.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Report only root-cause, correction, stage-transition, blocker, or completion events.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Communication and polling controls are mandatory.

rootCauses.rootCause: A successful state transition was not accepted as the new source of truth before the same mutation was repeated.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Repeat a state-changing action after its postcondition is already satisfied.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Read the returned state, stop the mutation sequence, and select a new action only for a different required target.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Every state-changing call requires explicit preconditions and postconditions; a satisfied postcondition prohibits an unchanged repeat.

rootCauses.rootCause: The intended target and action were described correctly, but the invoked tool recipient was not validated against that declaration.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Trust a prose intention without checking the actual action recipient immediately before execution.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Use an explicit operation-intent record and invoke only the action whose target type, identifier, and postcondition match it.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Every mutation requires an executable target-action precondition and postcondition record; a mismatch blocks the action.

rootCauses.rootCause: A sequential file update or delete used a stale blob SHA instead of the current file version.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Reuse a previously captured blob SHA after the same path has changed.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Fetch the target file immediately before the mutation and use its current blob SHA.
rootCauses.preventionControl: A 409 conflict stops the write sequence; current file state and SHA must be refreshed before retry.

rootCauses.rootCause: A relationship-graph test treated the nearest shared predecessor and the original shared root cause as the same graph level.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Use one expected ancestor value for nearest-common-ancestor and common-root-ancestor assertions.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Build a multi-level causal chain and assert nearest and canonical-root ancestry independently.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Every multi-level relationship-graph test must verify nearest and canonical-root ancestor outputs separately.

rootCauses.rootCause: Pull-request governance trusted an author-selected learning outcome instead of calculating the requirement from the diff and reconciled evidence.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Allow the pull-request author to choose new, existing, or none from a free-text field.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Calculate required or not-required from rule, checklist, process, template, automation, and failure evidence, then infer ledger classification.
rootCauses.preventionControl: The manual learning-outcome field is prohibited and trusted reconciliation enforces the rule-engine decision.
